Author: Noranda
Name: XIV Shinies Sync
Punchline: Your collections, on xiv-shinies.com, the moment you earn them.
Description: Automatically records your collection progress on XIV Shinies (https://xiv-shinies.com). New unlocks — quests, achievements, mounts, minions, and more — appear on the site within seconds, and everything else syncs automatically in the background. Fully opt-in: nothing uploads until you finish the short setup, and you choose exactly which collections to send. Use /shinies to get started.
